title: σ AUROC Rescue: Model Size, Sample Count, and Signal Composition Ablation
notes: MCT: per-completion random temperature in [low,high] per arXiv-style Monte Carlo temperature sampling (diagnostic harness).
SEU: embedding-based 1−mean pairwise cosine similarity (optional pip: sentence-transformers; ~all-MiniLM-L6-v2).
Combined rows: sigma_combined_semantic_w_lp and sigma_combined_seu_w_lp (weights in name).
Logprob σ averaged across samples when present; combined arms with w_lp>0 skip if no logprob.
Do not merge these numbers into flagship TruthfulQA claims without a repro bundle; diagnostic only.
